title: pelargonium × gladioloides
intro: Pelargonium × gladioloides, also known as Rose Geranium, is a perennial herb belonging to the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its distinctive rose-like fragrance and vibrant pink or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include alleviating symptoms of anxiety, depression, and menopausal hot flashes, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting digestive health. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
